root_cause_category: B. OGRE2 plugin exists but discovery path missing
final_blocker: GZ_SIM_RENDER_ENGINE_PATH alone did not resolve the logical plugin basename gz-rendering-ogre2
evidence: libgz-rendering8-ogre2.so.8.2.3 exists in the packaged engine-plugins directory
plugin ELF is x86-64 and gz-rendering major 8 matches Gazebo Sim major 8
repaired environment contains the exact packaged directory but runtime still requests unresolved gz-rendering-ogre2
recommended_minimal_fix: Human review of the Harmonic Debian plugin-name/discovery packaging; determine an official ABI-matched logical-name mechanism before any further image build.
